title: EQ - Saved Custom EQ, reset defaults - returns to Bass, but leaves custom not saved
scenario: Custom EQ slider values reset to default positions instead of retaining saved custom profile after Reset Defaults from Device Settings
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap on the connected Poly audio device to open Device Settings
Create a custom EQ profile by adjusting slider values (e.g., boost bass, cut treble)
Save the custom EQ profile with a name
Go back to Audio Settings → Equalizer
expected: After Reset Defaults, the EQ preset reverts to 'Bass' (as expected), and the saved custom EQ profile should still be available with its slider values retained.
